params.SpellDescription: Conjure a card of your choice from CARDNAME's spellbook into your hand. Activate only as a sorcery.

remaining_params.SpellDescription: Conjure a card of your choice from CARDNAME's spellbook into your hand. Activate only as a sorcery.

params.TriggerDescription: At the beginning of your upkeep, instant and sorcery cards in your hand perpetually gain "This spell costs {1} less to cast."
